components.scope: NotInject_one, NotInject_two, and NotInject_three (339 benign prompts)
components.notes: The pipeline reads the official authors' JSON mirror in the MIT-licensed PIGuard repository.

constraints: Import exactly the three named NotInject subsets, each containing 113 records.
Preserve trigger-word lists and category labels as original labels.
Do not treat benign source labels as proof that no instruction is present.
citations: Li et al. (2025). PIGuard: Prompt Injection Guardrail via Mitigating Overdefense for Free. ACL 2025.
